svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(31, 78, 121), rgb(142, 182, 219)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(15, 45, 74), rgb(180, 206, 230));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 158px; height: 1px; padding-top: 240px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 18px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#ffffff, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
